scripts.check: biome check --write --unsafe && turbo lint && pnpm check-types
scripts.check-all: pnpm i && biome check --write --unsafe && turbo lint && pnpm check-types && pnpm fe fix-deps && pnpm fe check-expo && pnpm turbo build
scripts.check-ci: biome check --unsafe && turbo lint-ci && pnpm check-types && pnpm fe check-expo
